News

Andrew Bowie's speech to Scottish Conservative Conference 2026

Monday, 23 February, 2026
Good morning, Conference and thank you Kevin...great to see you here in the real North! It’s great to be back in Edinburgh for our Party Conference. Now, the last time I was Edinburgh, I was just down the road with Russell and Kemi. Sipping common sense Conservative whisky cocktails in the shadow of Edinburgh Castle, as the sun set on a beautiful winter day... You might remember the day. It...
